desc.zh: 專注於打造高效能的 Web 應用。具備從系統架構、API 開發、CI/CD 到雲端基礎建設的完整實戰經驗。熱衷於解決複雜的技術問題，喜歡把好的想法變成真正可以用的產品
desc.en: Focused on building high-performance web applications, with hands-on experience across system architecture, API development, CI/CD, and cloud infrastructure. Enjoys solving complex technical problems and shipping ideas as working products.
